pageContext.name: Red Truck with Mickey and Friends
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Enesco are proud to present the Red Truck with Mickey and Friends Figurine!  Loading a red pickup truck with a freshly picked Christmas tree, Minnie and Mickey Mouse pair up with Donald Duck and Goofy for a wonderful winter spent with friends in this Jim Shore design.  Don't miss your chance to add this figurine to your Disney collection today!
